title: ClientPortalWorkspace
description: Client-facing task-first workspace projection. This is a read-side UX contract only; it must never be treated as legal command-side truth. The shared shell spine stays explicit through `shell_family`, `object_anchor_ref`, `dominant_question`, `settlement_state`, and `recovery_posture`, while route continuity, portal-specific posture detail, stale-view guards, one authoritative route-stability contract, shared portal interaction grammar, and quantified completion reliability remain explicit through `workspace_posture`, `workspace_version`, `freshness_state`, `view_guard_ref`, `stability_contract`, `interaction_layer`, `route_context`, and `reliability_summary`.
